question_text: The Moon has a mass of approximately 7.3 × 10²² kg. If you could divide this by 81, approximately what would you get?
correct_answer: 9 × 10²⁰ kg (or 9 followed by 20 zeros in kg)
explanation: Dividing the Moon's mass by 81 gives approximately 9 × 10²⁰ kg. (Interesting fact: the Moon is about 81 times less massive than Earth!)
